# arktax

## 📦 Installation

You can install the development version of **arktax** from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("andrewallenbruce/arktax")
```

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the arktax project is released with a [Contributor Code
of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## Taxonomy

NUCC Health Care Provider Taxonomy Code Set.

- [`taxonomy_changelog()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/taxonomy_changelog.md)
  : Taxonomy Change Log
- [`taxonomy_definition()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/taxonomy_definition.md)
  : Taxonomy Definitions
- [`taxonomy_display()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/taxonomy_display.md)
  : Taxonomy Display Names
- [`taxonomy_hierarchy()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/taxonomy_hierarchy.md)
  : Taxonomy Hierarchy
- [`taxonomy_raw()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/taxonomy_raw.md)
  : Raw Taxonomy File
- [`taxonomy_sources()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/taxonomy_sources.md)
  : Taxonomy Sources

## Crosswalk

Medicare Provider and Supplier Taxonomy Crosswalk.

- [`crosswalk_footnotes()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/crosswalk_footnotes.md)
  : Medicare Specialty Crosswalk Footnotes
- [`crosswalk_raw()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/crosswalk_raw.md)
  : Raw Crosswalk File
- [`crosswalk_taxonomy()`](https://andrewallenbruce.github.io/arktax/reference/crosswalk_taxonomy.md)
  : Taxonomy - Medicare Specialty Crosswalk
